title: rhus radicans f. negundo
intro: Rhus radicans f. negundo, commonly known as the Manchineel tree or Cowhage, is a plant species that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. It is a tropical plant known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its use in treating various health conditions, including fever, skin diseases, and rheumatism. The plant's extracts have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms and promote overall health. Herbal preparations of Rhus radicans f. negundo include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
